cases.name: resolve-roles-from-registry-no-scan
cases.note: Config is unambiguous: 'Read only .agents/universal-plugin.json … Do not scan user-global, project-global, or project-local plugin directories.' Agent would follow exactly.

cases.name: omitted-role-key-convention-fallback
cases.note: Config explicitly separates missing key (convention fallback '<plugin>-<role>') from null (degenerate). An agent would use aces-impl-producer for a missing impl-producer key.

cases.name: null-role-degenerates-to-no-agent
cases.note: Config: 'null → the role degenerates (no agent)'. The SDD default for impl-producer is 'generic Builder (no agent)' — same outcome. For plan-producer null means no agent, not sdd-planner. Config is clear.

cases.name: two-plugin-domain-needs-input-no-loop
cases.note: Config: 'read the domain-plugin map … if it names the owner … use it. Otherwise return STATUS: needs-input … on resume this read is decisive, so the suspend does not loop.' Every constraint is explicit.

cases.name: mode-derived-from-freeze-state
cases.note: Config: 'Phase and MODE are derived, never passed.' Derivation table is explicit: unfrozen .feature → explore, frozen .feature → implement. Both invocations covered.

cases.name: suspend-with-batched-questions
cases.note: Config: 'Never ask the user a question directly … return STATUS: needs-input with the questions batched.' Step 4 says aggregate into one batch each. Three questions → one needs-input with all three.

cases.name: write-boundary-markers-and-aligned-only
cases.note: Config's Write boundary is explicit: only '<!-- open: --> markers and the aligned frontmatter field'. All prohibited writes are named. No ambiguity.

cases.name: aligned-layer-scoped-spec-gate
cases.note: Config: 'At the spec gate, aligned: true means the contract layer (spec.md ↔ .feature) is in sync — impl is not required; exploratory spike code is excluded as scaffolding.' Spike-code exclusion is explicit.

cases.name: aggregate-observations-no-spawn
cases.note: Config Step 4: 'Aggregate every child's QUESTIONS, CONTENT_GAPS, OBSERVATIONS into one batch each.' And: 'Never spawn specs or write outside the spec you own.' Both rules explicit.

cases.name: no-plugin-fallback-to-sdd-defaults
cases.note: Config: 'Zero matches → every role degenerates to its SDD default (below).' All five defaults are listed. Workflow proceeds without suspension. No ambiguity.

cases.name: aligned-impl-gate-all-judges-pass
cases.note: Config: 'At the impl gate, aligned: true … set it only when every impl-judge returns IMPLEMENTATION_PASS: true.' Timing constraint also explicit: 'only synthesis (Step 4) may set it back to true.'
